title: AI Semester-End Examination Preparation Flowchart
description: A step-by-step guide outlining the key topics and their connections to study for the final exam in Module 5: Introduction to AI.
relationships: Core AI Concepts leads to Problem-Solving & Search
Problem-Solving & Search connects to Knowledge Representation
Knowledge Representation is applied in Machine Learning Fundamentals
All previous elements are considered within the context of AI Ethics & Future
